policy: This file freezes the minimum user-visible functional scope of every legacy Card before implementation. A scope is not completion evidence: each capability must later be expanded into source-evidenced acceptance items and automated tests. UI hierarchy, controls, density and states remain characterized by the legacy source component unless an explicit deviation is recorded.
